TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ci-pu, title = Ci-pu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ci-pu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ci-pu "U-ke-lan a kamu –ö–ł—ó–≤,Low-ma, Kyiv, pangiha, ('k…™jiuŐĮ) )tini U-ke-lan teban nu saamisan Nye-pow teban nu sa'wac, u U-ke-lan a angangan, Ci-pu-cow a cen-bu atu labu nu kanatal u saayaway a tukay, 2021 a mihcaan hawsa 296 a emga ku tademaw. ŚüļŤľĒ(ÁÉŹŚÖčŤė≠Ť™ě:–ö–ł—ó–≤,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Kyiv,Áôľťü≥:('k…™jiuŐĮ) ) 296Ťź¨. nilaculan ayzaay a Ci-pu nu Tung-ow a kahenulan a kusi, kangak, lalangawan pasubana'ay, uyza yadah ku kaw-ke-ci a nilacul, talakaway pasubana'ay a sakaput atu likisi kitizaan patizeng, ahemal ku nipisanga' atu macakatay ku sapiculu' a basu, mahiniay Ci-pu isasaay a silamalay. Ci-pu a ngangan makay "Ci-I", nakamuan uyni nipatizengan a tukay "Ci-I, sye-ke-atu-how-li tatulu a calkakaan atu sabana nu heni ci Lye-pi-ci" Ci-pu i 5 se-ci hawsa u tiniay tu nu miswbayay a kitizaan, zikuz haymaw satu mala Tung-s-la-bu- nu macakatay a kitizaan, I 10 se-ci katukuh 13 se-ci mala u angangan nu Ci-pu-Low-s. 1240 a mihca 12 a bulad a Pa-tu midebung mahamin tu mapeci' kuyni a tukay, Ci-pu malawpes t uku naayaway tu pinaay a seci nu nikaala malilid ku cen-ce, Sa-hwang a aenengan zikuz namalimad tayza i Mu-si-ke makutay Low-s a tademaw. cunus zikuz icelangay a kanatal a mulekal, miliyaw ku itiniay mala kuyni tabakiay a kanatal nu lilisay a muliyaw tu kitizaan "Li-taw-wan a tabakiay a kanatal, Pow-lan Li-taw-wan malacabay, E-low-s hungti a Kanata" 1240ŚĻī12 . 19 se-ci tu zikuz, Ci-pu zayhan E-low-s hungti a kanatal a kusi mingayaw muliyaw mulekal. Ci-pu namitaneng i 1917 a mihcaan E-kow mingayaw kahuyahuyan a zidayy zikuz, makay 1921 a mihcaan malingatu mala nu U-ke-lan su-wi-ay a syakay cu-i-kung-he-kow kahenulan a tukay,1934 a mihcaan zikuz mikutay tu Ha-al-ke-bu mala u an gangan tu nu tukay. 19šłĖÁīÄśúę, . Su-te a kanganganyawan, Ci-pu i 1941 amihca 7 a bulad 7 a demiad- 9 a bulad 26 a dem iad Ci-pu a kanganganyawan macalap nu Na-suy-te-kow a kow-bang a hitay, 1943 a mihca 10 a bulad macalap ngayawen nu Su-lyen nu sumanahay a hitay, zikuz nu kangangayaw kalamkam sa macakat mala nu Su-lyen nu sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukay. i 20 seci 80 a ziday nu sazikuzay mikilul tu Tung-ow a syakay cu-i kanatal a kawaw tulin sa mahuyahuy, itawyyaw mala nu Su-lyen malakaputay a kanatal a tademaw U-ke-lan i 1991 a mihca 12 a bulad 1 a demiad mikawaw maawas tu ku teked a kung-tow, kilul uyni a bulad 8 a demiad tu E-low-s atu Pay- E-low-s matalelek "Pye-low-wi-ze miyasuku" zikuz, tatenga'ay tu misateked. Ci-pu kilul mala satekeday a U-ke-lan kapulung a kanatal angangan a tukay i U-ke-lan a iciba keyzay atu mikutay tu binawlan a situngu tu kawaw i kaniyulan, Ci-pu mahiza u U-ke-lan satabakiay atu kakitaan a tukay, zkanahatu i Su-lyen matastas zikuz miida tu sapingayaw nu hita a nisanga'an maselep, sakay tiniay a kagak gizice caay kakapah, nika miedapay atu gingku lekal sanaykezay a kaput palahad tu Ci-pu nademiadan atu macakat ku nikakadum, muenengan tu luma' atu nikauzip nu tukay nisanga'an malahad tulin a pawapen tu kalisiw. Ci-pu mala nu U-ke-lan sacapiay satipan a kakitizaan, sakaku tu Ow-mung mangaleb matatungus caay kalaliyas cin-tang i pisingkiwan situngusay tu kawaw. 2022 a mihcaan, Ci-pu muliyaw madebung, Wi-u a hitay sazikuzay malaheci mademec ku E-kow. Ci-pu kilul mala satekeday a U-ke-lan kapulung a kanatal angangan a tukay i U-ke-lan a iciba keyzay atu mikutay tu binawlan a situngu tu kawaw i kaniyulan, Ci-pu mahiza u U-ke-lan satabakiay atu kakitaan a tukay, zkanahatu i Su-lyen matastas zikuz miida tu sapingayaw nu hita a nisanga'an maselep, sakay tiniay a kagak gizice caay kakapah, nika miedapay atu gingku lekal sanaykezay a kaput palahad tu Ci-pu nademiadan atu macakat ku nikakadum,
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶i-pu "u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a kamu ****,r~…ĺow-ma, kji*, paŇčińßa, ( Ē~ °k*jiu*) )tini u-k…ô-r~…ĺan t…ôban nu saamisan nj…ô-pow t…ôban nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶, u u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a aŇčaŇčan, ¶i-pu- ¶ow a ¶…ôn-bu atu r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ u saajawaj a tukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa *** a …ômga ku tad…ômaw. **(****:****,***:kji*,**:( Ē~ °k*jiu*) ) ****. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ajzaaj a ¶i-pu nu tuŇč-ow a kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kusi, kaŇčak, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan pasubana Ē~ °aj, ujza jadańß ku kaw-k…ô- ¶i a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, tar~…ĺakawaj pasubana Ē~ °aj a sakaput atu r~…ĺikisi kitizaan patiz…ôŇč, ańß…ômar~…ĺ ku nipisaŇča Ē~ ° atu ma ¶akataj ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a basu, mańßiniaj ¶i-pu isasaaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. ¶i-pu a ŇčaŇčan makaj " ¶i-i", nakamuan ujni nipatiz…ôŇčan a tukaj " ¶i-i, sj…ô-k…ô-atu-ńßow-r~…ĺi tatur~…ĺu a ¶ar~…ĺkakaan atu sabana nu ńß…ôni ¶i r~…ĺj…ô-pi- ¶i" ¶i-pu i * s…ô- ¶i ńßawsa u tiniaj tu nu miswbajaj a kitizaan, zikuz ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺa tuŇč-s-r~…ĺa-bu- nu ma ¶akataj a kitizaan, i ** s…ô- ¶i katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan nu ¶i-pu-r~…ĺow-s. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad a pa-tu mid…ôbuŇč mańßamin tu map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° kujni a tukaj, ¶i-pu mar~…ĺawp…ôs t uku naajawaj tu pinaaj a s…ô ¶i nu nikaar~…ĺa mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sa-ńßwaŇč a a…ôn…ôŇčan zikuz namar~…ĺimad tajza i mu-si-k…ô makutaj r~…ĺow-s a tad…ômaw. ¶unus zikuz i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ a mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, mir~…ĺijaw ku itiniaj mar~…ĺa kujni tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a mur~…ĺijaw tu kitizaan "r~…ĺi-taw-wan a tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ, pow-r~…ĺan r~…ĺi-taw-wan mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, …ô-r~…ĺow-s ńßuŇčti a kanata" ******* . ** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz, ¶i-pu zajńßan …ô-r~…ĺow-s ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ a kusi miŇčajaw mur~…ĺijaw mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i-pu namitan…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan …ô-kow miŇčajaw kańßujańßujan a zidajj zikuz, makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa nu u-k…ô-r~…ĺan su-wi-aj a sjakaj ¶u-i-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tukaj,**** a mińß ¶aan zikuz mikutaj tu ńßa-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-bu mar~…ĺa u an gaŇčan tu nu tukaj. *****, . su-t…ô a kaŇčaŇčanjawan, ¶i-pu i **** amińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad- * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ôm iad ¶i-pu a kaŇčaŇčanjawan ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu na-suj-t…ô-kow a kow-baŇč a ńßitaj, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ma ¶ar~…ĺap Ňčajaw…ôn nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn nu sumanańßaj a ńßitaj, zikuz nu kaŇčaŇčajaw kar~…ĺamkam sa ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn nu sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a tukaj. i ** s…ô ¶i ** a zidaj nu sazikuzaj mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tuŇč-ow a sjakaj ¶u-i kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw tur~…ĺin sa mańßujańßuj, itawjjaw mar~…ĺa nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn mar~…ĺakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw u-k…ô-r~…ĺan i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mikawaw maawas tu ku t…ôk…ôd a kuŇč-tow, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ujni a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad tu …ô-r~…ĺow-s atu paj- …ô-r~…ĺow-s matar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ…ôk "pj…ô-r~…ĺow-wi-z…ô mijasuku" zikuz, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu misat…ôk…ôd. ¶i-pu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sat…ôk…ôdaj a u-k…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a tukaj i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a i ¶iba k…ôzaj atu mikutaj tu binawr~…ĺan a situŇču tu kawaw i kanijur~…ĺan, ¶i-pu mańßiza u u-k…ô-r~…ĺan satabakiaj atu kakitaan a tukaj, zkanańßatu i su-r~…ĺj…ôn matastas zikuz miida tu sapiŇčajaw nu ńßita a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sakaj tiniaj a kagak gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakapańß, nika mi…ôdapaj atu giŇčku r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ sanajk…ôzaj a kaput par~…ĺańßad tu ¶i-pu nad…ômiadan atu ma ¶akat ku nikakadum, mu…ôn…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu nikauzip nu tukaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺańßad tur~…ĺin a pawap…ôn tu kar~…ĺisiw. ¶i-pu mar~…ĺa nu u-k…ô-r~…ĺan sa ¶apiaj satipan a kakitizaan, sakaku tu ow-muŇč maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb matatuŇčus ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ¶in-taŇč i pisiŇčkiwan situŇčusaj tu kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i-pu mur~…ĺijaw mad…ôbuŇč, wi-u a ńßitaj sazikuzaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku …ô-kow. ¶i-pu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sat…ôk…ôdaj a u-k…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a tukaj i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a i ¶iba k…ôzaj atu mikutaj tu binawr~…ĺan a situŇču tu kawaw i kanijur~…ĺan, ¶i-pu mańßiza u u-k…ô-r~…ĺan satabakiaj atu kakitaan a tukaj, zkanańßatu i su-r~…ĺj…ôn matastas zikuz miida tu sapiŇčajaw nu ńßita a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sakaj tiniaj a kagak gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakapańß, nika mi…ôdapaj atu giŇčku r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ sanajk…ôzaj a kaput par~…ĺańßad tu ¶i-pu nad…ômiadan atu ma ¶akat ku nikakadum,
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ci-pu "U-ke-lan a kamu –ö–ł—ó–≤,Low-ma, Kyiv, pangiha, ('k…™jiuŐĮ) )tini U-ke-lan teban nu saamisan Nye-pow teban nu sa'wac, u U-ke-lan a angangan, Ci-pu-cow a cen-bu atu labu nu kanatal u saayaway a tukay, 2021 a mihcaan hawsa 296 a emga ku tademaw. ŚüļŤľĒ(ÁÉŹŚÖčŤė≠Ť™ě:–ö–ł—ó–≤,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Kyiv,Áôľťü≥:('k…™jiuŐĮ) ) 296Ťź¨. nilaculan ayzaay a Ci-pu nu Tung-ow a kahenulan a kusi, kangak, lalangawan pasubana'ay, uyza yadah ku kaw-ke-ci a nilacul, talakaway pasubana'ay a sakaput atu likisi kitizaan patizeng, ahemal ku nipisanga' atu macakatay ku sapiculu' a basu, mahiniay Ci-pu isasaay a silamalay. Ci-pu a ngangan makay "Ci-I", nakamuan uyni nipatizengan a tukay "Ci-I, sye-ke-atu-how-li tatulu a calkakaan atu sabana nu heni ci Lye-pi-ci" Ci-pu i 5 se-ci hawsa u tiniay tu nu miswbayay a kitizaan, zikuz haymaw satu mala Tung-s-la-bu- nu macakatay a kitizaan, I 10 se-ci katukuh 13 se-ci mala u angangan nu Ci-pu-Low-s. 1240 a mihca 12 a bulad a Pa-tu midebung mahamin tu mapeci' kuyni a tukay, Ci-pu malawpes t uku naayaway tu pinaay a seci nu nikaala malilid ku cen-ce, Sa-hwang a aenengan zikuz namalimad tayza i Mu-si-ke makutay Low-s a tademaw. cunus zikuz icelangay a kanatal a mulekal, miliyaw ku itiniay mala kuyni tabakiay a kanatal nu lilisay a muliyaw tu kitizaan "Li-taw-wan a tabakiay a kanatal, Pow-lan Li-taw-wan malacabay, E-low-s hungti a Kanata" 1240ŚĻī12 . 19 se-ci tu zikuz, Ci-pu zayhan E-low-s hungti a kanatal a kusi mingayaw muliyaw mulekal. Ci-pu namitaneng i 1917 a mihcaan E-kow mingayaw kahuyahuyan a zidayy zikuz, makay 1921 a mihcaan malingatu mala nu U-ke-lan su-wi-ay a syakay cu-i-kung-he-kow kahenulan a tukay,1934 a mihcaan zikuz mikutay tu Ha-al-ke-bu mala u an gangan tu nu tukay. 19šłĖÁīÄśúę, . Su-te a kanganganyawan, Ci-pu i 1941 amihca 7 a bulad 7 a demiad- 9 a bulad 26 a dem iad Ci-pu a kanganganyawan macalap nu Na-suy-te-kow a kow-bang a hitay, 1943 a mihca 10 a bulad macalap ngayawen nu Su-lyen nu sumanahay a hitay, zikuz nu kangangayaw kalamkam sa macakat mala nu Su-lyen nu sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukay. i 20 seci 80 a ziday nu sazikuzay mikilul tu Tung-ow a syakay cu-i kanatal a kawaw tulin sa mahuyahuy, itawyyaw mala nu Su-lyen malakaputay a kanatal a tademaw U-ke-lan i 1991 a mihca 12 a bulad 1 a demiad mikawaw maawas tu ku teked a kung-tow, kilul uyni a bulad 8 a demiad tu E-low-s atu Pay- E-low-s matalelek "Pye-low-wi-ze miyasuku" zikuz, tatenga'ay tu misateked. Ci-pu kilul mala satekeday a U-ke-lan kapulung a kanatal angangan a tukay i U-ke-lan a iciba keyzay atu mikutay tu binawlan a situngu tu kawaw i kaniyulan, Ci-pu mahiza u U-ke-lan satabakiay atu kakitaan a tukay, zkanahatu i Su-lyen matastas zikuz miida tu sapingayaw nu hita a nisanga'an maselep, sakay tiniay a kagak gizice caay kakapah, nika miedapay atu gingku lekal sanaykezay a kaput palahad tu Ci-pu nademiadan atu macakat ku nikakadum, muenengan tu luma' atu nikauzip nu tukay nisanga'an malahad tulin a pawapen tu kalisiw. Ci-pu mala nu U-ke-lan sacapiay satipan a kakitizaan, sakaku tu Ow-mung mangaleb matatungus caay kalaliyas cin-tang i pisingkiwan situngusay tu kawaw. 2022 a mihcaan, Ci-pu muliyaw madebung, Wi-u a hitay sazikuzay malaheci mademec ku E-kow. Ci-pu kilul mala satekeday a U-ke-lan kapulung a kanatal angangan a tukay i U-ke-lan a iciba keyzay atu mikutay tu binawlan a situngu tu kawaw i kaniyulan, Ci-pu mahiza u U-ke-lan satabakiay atu kakitaan a tukay, zkanahatu i Su-lyen matastas zikuz miida tu sapingayaw nu hita a nisanga'an maselep, sakay tiniay a kagak gizice caay kakapah, nika miedapay atu gingku lekal sanaykezay a kaput palahad tu Ci-pu nademiadan atu macakat ku nikakadum,

¶ar~…ĺap nu na-suj-t…ô-kow a kow-baŇč a ńßitaj, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ma ¶ar~…ĺap Ňčajaw…ôn nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn nu sumanańßaj a ńßitaj, zikuz nu kaŇčaŇčajaw kar~…ĺamkam sa ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn nu sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a tukaj. i ** s…ô ¶i ** a zidaj nu sazikuzaj mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tuŇč-ow a sjakaj ¶u-i kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw tur~…ĺin sa mańßujańßuj, itawjjaw mar~…ĺa nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn mar~…ĺakaputaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw u-k…ô-r~…ĺan i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mikawaw maawas tu ku t…ôk…ôd a kuŇč-tow, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ujni a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad tu …ô-r~…ĺow-s atu paj- …ô-r~…ĺow-s matar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ…ôk "pj…ô-r~…ĺow-wi-z…ô mijasuku" zikuz, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu misat…ôk…ôd. ¶i-pu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sat…ôk…ôdaj a u-k…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a tukaj i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a i ¶iba k…ôzaj atu mikutaj tu binawr~…ĺan a situŇču tu kawaw i kanijur~…ĺan, ¶i-pu mańßiza u u-k…ô-r~…ĺan satabakiaj atu kakitaan a tukaj, zkanańßatu i su-r~…ĺj…ôn matastas zikuz miida tu sapiŇčajaw nu ńßita a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sakaj tiniaj a kagak gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakapańß, nika mi…ôdapaj atu giŇčku r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ sanajk…ôzaj a kaput par~…ĺańßad tu ¶i-pu nad…ômiadan atu ma ¶akat ku nikakadum, mu…ôn…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu nikauzip nu tukaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺańßad tur~…ĺin a pawap…ôn tu kar~…ĺisiw. ¶i-pu mar~…ĺa nu u-k…ô-r~…ĺan sa ¶apiaj satipan a kakitizaan, sakaku tu ow-muŇč maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb matatuŇčus ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ¶in-taŇč i pisiŇčkiwan situŇčusaj tu kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i-pu mur~…ĺijaw mad…ôbuŇč, wi-u a ńßitaj sazikuzaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku …ô-kow. ¶i-pu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sat…ôk…ôdaj a u-k…ô-r~…ĺan kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a tukaj i u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a i ¶iba k…ôzaj atu mikutaj tu binawr~…ĺan a situŇču tu kawaw i kanijur~…ĺan, ¶i-pu mańßiza u u-k…ô-r~…ĺan satabakiaj atu kakitaan a tukaj, zkanańßatu i su-r~…ĺj…ôn matastas zikuz miida tu sapiŇčajaw nu ńßita a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sakaj tiniaj a kagak gizi ¶…ô ¶aaj kakapańß, nika mi…ôdapaj atu giŇčku r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ sanajk…ôzaj a kaput par~…ĺańßad tu ¶i-pu nad…ômiadan atu ma ¶akat ku nikakadum,
